Jab 1
moves.landing_lag: Transitions to jab 2 as early as frame 9

moves.name: Jab 1
moves.landing_lag: Transitions to jab 2 as early as frame 9

moves.name: Jab 2
moves.landing_lag: Transitions to jab 3 as early as frame 9

moves.name: Forward Tilt 1
moves.landing_lag: Transitions to next attack as early as frame 18. Arm, head, leg invincibility on frame 9. Arm invincibility on frame 10-11.

moves.name: Down Smash
moves.landing_lag: Damage listed is the same for both the first and second hit.

moves.name: Up B (Woosh/Swoosh/Kaswoosh)
moves.damage: Woosh: Takes 3 frames to enter charge state. Cost: 5MP
moves.notes: Swoosh: Takes 13 frames to reach this level of charge. Cost: 9MP | Kaswoosh: Cost: 18 MP. Failing to cast any level of charge results in 12 landing lag. | 7.0 / 3.0/4.0 / 3.0/4.0 | 7 / 5/5 / 5/5 | 3 / 2/2 / 2/2 | Multi/Final | ** | ** | --

moves.name: Whack
moves.landing_lag: Cost: 10MP (chance to instantly obliterate opponent, higher chance with higher opponent %)

moves.name: Thwack
moves.landing_lag: Cost: 30MP (chance to instantly obliterate opponent, higher chance with higher opponent %)

moves.name: Kamikazee
moves.landing_lag: Invulnerable for entire duration. Unblockable. Cost: 1MP. Time slows after frame 41, giving victims about two frames to act. Hit 2 does 50.0 damage in the center or 35.0 damage on the outer hitbox.

moves.name: Magic Burst
moves.landing_lag: Cost: All MP. Hitbox size and damage increases based on how much MP you have. Hero does not suffer hitlag from this attack.

moves.name: Snooze
moves.landing_lag: Cost: 16MP. Can put airborne opponents to sleep

moves.name: Heal
moves.landing_lag: Cost: 7MP. Heals 11.0 damage on frame 6. Amount not affected by 1v1 multiplier.

moves.name: Oomph
moves.landing_lag: Cost: 16MP. Damage of (only) melee attacks multiplied by 1.6. Damage received multiplied by 1.2. Lasts 10 seconds.

moves.name: Zoom
moves.landing_lag: Cost: 8MP. Can act before landing back onstage

moves.name: Hocus Pocus
moves.landing_lag: Cost: 4MP. Casts a random spell. Can also put Hero to sleep, turn Hero invisible, shrink Hero, or mushroom grow Hero.

moves.name: Hatchet Man
moves.notes: Shield Breaks (-24, sour spot) | -- | Shield Breaks | 37—40 | 48

moves.name: Psych Up
moves.landing_lag: Cost: 14MP. Raises the damage and knockback of Hero’s next attack, will last until a move fully connects or is blocked by an opponent’s shield.
